title: rosa elliptica var. minuta

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. parts: Rosa elliptica var. minuta has many medicinal parts, such as its flowers, leaves, stems, and roots. The flowers of Rosa elliptica var. minuta contain flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The leaves and stems of the plant are rich in phenolic compounds, including gallic acid and ellagic acid, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anticancer activities. The roots of Rosa elliptica var. minuta contain saponins, including rosarin and rosavin, which have been traditionally used to treat cardiovascular and respiratory issues.
side_effects: Rosa elliptica var. minuta can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues.
